stages.name: deps
stages.cmd: set -e; export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; apt-get update >/dev/null 2>&1; apt-get install -y build-essential git git-lfs subversion cmake ninja-build pkg-config python3 python3-dev make libx11-dev libxxf86vm-dev libxcursor-dev libxi-dev libxrandr-dev libxinerama-dev libegl-dev libwayland-dev wayland-protocols libxkbcommon-dev libdbus-1-dev libepoxy-dev libgl-dev libglu1-mesa-dev libglew-dev libsdl2-dev curl ca-certificates file >/dev/null 2>&1; git lfs install >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo CMAKE=$(cmake --version | head -1); echo GCC=$(gcc -dumpfullversion 2>/dev/null || gcc --version | head -1); echo GIT=$(git --version); echo DISK=$(df -h /root | tail -1)

stages.name: clone
stages.cmd: set -e; mkdir -p /root; if [ ! -d /root/cx-cycles/.git ]; then git clone --filter=blob:none https://projects.blender.org/blender/cycles.git /root/cx-cycles; fi; cd /root/cx-cycles; git remote set-url origin https://projects.blender.org/blender/cycles.git; git fetch --filter=blob:none origin main; git checkout --detach FETCH_HEAD; git lfs install --local >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo CX_CYCLES_REMOTE=$(git remote get-url origin); echo CX_CYCLES_REF=main; echo CX_CYCLES_HEAD=$(git rev-parse HEAD); git log --oneline -1

stages.name: sync_libs
stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; make update 2>&1 | tail -80; echo CX_CYCLES_LIBDIR=$(du -sh lib 2>/dev/null || echo ABSENT)

stages.name: build
stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; make -j8 2>&1 | tail -100; test -x install/cycles; echo CX_CYCLES_BUILD_OK=1; ls -lh install/cycles

stages.name: smoke
stages.cmd: set -e; cd /root/cx-cycles; test -x /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles; echo CX_CYCLES_BIN=/root/cx-cycles/install/cycles; file /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles; (/root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --help 2>&1 || true) | head -80; (/root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --version 2>&1 || true) | head -20; ldd /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles | head -60; echo CX_CYCLES_SMOKE_OK=1

notes: official standalone Cycles is the compatibility oracle
runtime checkout belongs under .artifacts or a pod-local path
no credentials are read or written by this module

stages.name: deps
stages.cmd: set -e; export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; apt-get update >/dev/null 2>&1; apt-get install -y build-essential git git-lfs subversion cmake ninja-build pkg-config python3 python3-dev make libx11-dev libxxf86vm-dev libxcursor-dev libxi-dev libxrandr-dev libxinerama-dev libegl-dev libwayland-dev wayland-protocols libxkbcommon-dev libdbus-1-dev libepoxy-dev libgl-dev libglu1-mesa-dev libglew-dev libsdl2-dev curl ca-certificates file >/dev/null 2>&1; git lfs install >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo CMAKE=$(cmake --version | head -1); echo GCC=$(gcc -dumpfullversion 2>/dev/null || gcc --version | head -1); echo GIT=$(git --version); echo DISK=$(df -h /root | tail -1)

stages.name: clone
stages.cmd: set -e; mkdir -p /root; if [ ! -d /root/cx-cycles/.git ]; then git clone --filter=blob:none https://projects.blender.org/blender/cycles.git /root/cx-cycles; fi; cd /root/cx-cycles; git remote set-url origin https://projects.blender.org/blender/cycles.git; git fetch --filter=blob:none origin main; git checkout --detach FETCH_HEAD; git lfs install --local >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo CX_CYCLES_REMOTE=$(git remote get-url origin); echo CX_CYCLES_REF=main; echo CX_CYCLES_HEAD=$(git rev-parse HEAD); git log --oneline -1

stages.name: sync_libs
stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; make update 2>&1 | tail -80; echo CX_CYCLES_LIBDIR=$(du -sh lib 2>/dev/null || echo ABSENT)

stages.name: build
stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; PARALLEL_JOBS=8 make 2>&1 | tail -100; test -x install/cycles; echo CX_CYCLES_BUILD_OK=1; ls -lh install/cycles

stages.name: binary_smoke
stages.cmd: set -e; cd /root/cx-cycles; test -x /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles; echo CX_CYCLES_BIN=/root/cx-cycles/install/cycles; file /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles; (/root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --help 2>&1 || true) | head -80; (/root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --version 2>&1 || true) | head -20; ldd /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles | head -60; echo CX_CYCLES_BINARY_SMOKE_OK=1

stages.name: render_smoke
stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; rm -f /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --samples 8 --output /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png examples/scene_monkey.xml 2>&1 | tail -80; test -s /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; file /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; ls -lh /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; echo CX_CYCLES_RENDER_SMOKE_OK=1

stages.name: clone
stages.cmd: set -e; mkdir -p /root; if [ ! -d /root/cx-cycles/.git ]; then git clone --filter=blob:none https://projects.blender.org/blender/cycles.git /root/cx-cycles; fi; cd /root/cx-cycles; git remote set-url origin https://projects.blender.org/blender/cycles.git; git fetch --filter=blob:none origin main; git reset --hard >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; git clean -fd >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; git checkout --detach FETCH_HEAD; git lfs install --local >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo CX_CYCLES_REMOTE=$(git remote get-url origin); echo CX_CYCLES_REF=main; echo CX_CYCLES_HEAD=$(git rev-parse HEAD); git log --oneline -1

stages.name: apply_patches
stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; printf %s  | base64 -d > /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_0.patch; git apply --check /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_0.patch; git apply /tmp/cx_cycles_patch_0.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_APPLIED=0001-standalone-sample-subset-cli.patch; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_COUNT=1

stages.name: sync_libs
stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; make update 2>&1 | tail -80; echo CX_CYCLES_LIBDIR=$(du -sh lib 2>/dev/null || echo ABSENT)

stages.name: build
stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; PARALLEL_JOBS=8 make 2>&1 | tail -100; test -x install/cycles; echo CX_CYCLES_BUILD_OK=1; ls -lh install/cycles

stages.name: binary_smoke
stages.cmd: set -e; cd /root/cx-cycles; test -x /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles; echo CX_CYCLES_BIN=/root/cx-cycles/install/cycles; file /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles; (/root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --help 2>&1 || true) | head -80; (/root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --version 2>&1 || true) | head -20; ldd /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles | head -60; echo CX_CYCLES_BINARY_SMOKE_OK=1

stages.name: patch_cli_smoke
stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --help 2>&1 | grep -E -- '--sample-subset-offset|--sample-subset-length'; rm -f /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --samples 8 --sample-subset-offset 0 --sample-subset-length 8 --output /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png examples/scene_monkey.xml 2>&1 | tail -80; test -s /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; file /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; ls -lh /tmp/cx_cycles_subset_monkey.png; echo CX_CYCLES_PATCH_CLI_SMOKE_OK=1

stages.name: render_smoke
stages.cmd: set -e -o pipefail; cd /root/cx-cycles; rm -f /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; /root/cx-cycles/install/cycles --samples 8 --output /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png examples/scene_monkey.xml 2>&1 | tail -80; test -s /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; file /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; ls -lh /tmp/cx_cycles_monkey.png; echo CX_CYCLES_RENDER_SMOKE_OK=1

notes: official standalone Cycles is the compatibility oracle
runtime checkout belongs under .artifacts or a pod-local path
no credentials are read or written by this module
